name: Caldicote Messages
messages: Welcome to Caldicote Castle — take a moment to get your bearings before you dive in.
Heading toward the main field? Follow the arrow and enjoy the walk through the grounds.
If you're unsure where you are, check the map and look for the castle walls as your landmark.
Grab some water before exploring the next area — stay sharp, stay hydrated.
Take a breather if you need one — the castle park is perfect for a quick reset.
Lost your group? Pick a visible spot like the Castle Entrance and regroup there.
If something feels off, head towards a staffed area or the Medical Point.
Keep an eye on your surroundings — it makes navigating the fields smoother.
Check out the Ice Cream Van near the north side — perfect cool‑down treat.
Helicopter landing scheduled for 1pm — keep clear of the helipad zone.
Food Area A is serving all day — worth a stop if you're passing through.
Food Area B has some great options too — follow the arrow and explore.
Caldicote Castle Café is open — ideal for a sit‑down break.
Fair Ground area ahead — expect more noise and movement.
Playground zone nearby — a good spot for families to pause.
Security HQ is close if you need assistance or directions.
Let’s thank all our service members here today — heroes everywhere.
If you're heading to the Parking Entrance, follow the corridor markers.
Check the Caldicote website for more events happening this season.
You’re doing great — keep going and enjoy the day.
